case_title: COLOMBINI, RUDY vs. JOHNSON, ED et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ED REIKEN, JEFFREY

C/C FOR FURTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERECE OR JURY TRIAL IF NOT SETTLED. ALL REQUIRED PARTIES WERE PRESENT. THE COURT AND THE PARTIES MEET INFORMALLY AND HAS REACHED A STIPULATION. THE STIPULATION WAS SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES AND RECITED ON THE RECORD. JUDGMENT WAS AGAINTS DEFENDANTS ED JOHNSON AND JEFFREY REIKEN FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESION OF THE PREMISES 677 ELLIS ST. #3, SF CA. DEFT. WAIVED RIGHT TO RECOVER ANY AND ALL SECURITY DEPOSITS OR RENTS. THE JUDGMENT IS STAYED UNTIL 5PM ON OR BEFORE 7JULY01. DEFTS. HAVE AGREED TO, AND THEREBY WAIVE, THEIR RIGHT TO SEEK ANY FURTHER STAYS OF EVICTION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT MAINTIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE PARTIES STIP. FOR JUDGMENT AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
